ddls:
CREATE TABLE "birth_demographics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "numbirth_hispforb_other" INTEGER /* Number of births for Hispanic or Latino, foreign-born, other */,
  "numbirth_hispforb_mex" INTEGER /* Number of births for Hispanic or Latino, foreign-born, Mexican */,
  "numbirth_hispnativeb_nonmex" INTEGER /* Number of births for Hispanic or Latino, native-born, non-Mexican */,
  "numbirth_hisp_mexican_nativeb" INTEGER /* Number of births for Hispanic or Latino, Mexican, native-born */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ethnic group */,
  "year_quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of mothers */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of mothers */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of mothers */,
  "birth_order" INTEGER /* Order of the birth */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_demographics_ethnic_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnic_group_id") REFERENCES ethnic_groups ("ethnic_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_demographics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regional_demographics ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_groups" (
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic group */,
  "ethnic_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnic group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population size of the ethnic group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ethnic group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ethnic group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_demographics" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "total_births" INTEGER /* Total number of births in the region */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution in the region */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution in the region */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the regional data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the regional data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_demographics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES birth_demographics ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES birth_demographics ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
